Project.Name: CA17097 - Anaheim - La Palma Phase 2 (exp) - 27261 - 2026.01.08 - UP02.xml
Project.Title: Johnson Dev. Hawiian Park Self Storage

Task.Name: Johnson Dev. Hawiian Park Self Storage
Surface Demo Existing Phase II areas
AQMD Notification for Transite Fire Water
Identify & Cap Existing Utilities to Limits
Abate Fire Water Lines per Change Order #2
Rain and Mud Delay - Taken from item 147 below
Rain Delay 1/2-1.9/9 Inc. Pad Dry Out - Part from task 147
Storm Drain Piping & Catch Basins from Phase 1 Stubs
Extend Fire / Domestic Water Service to Building
Extend Power & Lov Voltage conduits to Bldg from Stubs
Onsite improvements For Early Base Pave
Agg Base Import & AC Base Paving
Structural Steel Framing & Metal Deck to 2nd floor N.
Structural Steel Framing & Metal Deck to 2nd floor S.
State Elevator inspection Lead Time & Approval
Unit Partitions / Hallway System & Doors 1st floor
Unit Partitions / Hallway System & Doors 2nd Floor
Unit Partitions & Hallway System & Doors 5th Floor
Overhead Doors, Liner & Demising Panels Comp.
Exterior Metal Frame Sheathing & WRB @ Tower
Rain Days Included - Used as of 1/6/26
